target_notes: NASA's Human Landing System (HLS) Option A contract, awarded to SpaceX 2020-05-13 (announced 2021-04-16 after a court challenge from Blue Origin). Authoritative source on the contract whose Starship-derived lander will return crewed missions to the Moon under Artemis. ~$3.02 B obligated as of 2026-04-09. Award type D = Definitive Contract; PIID 80MSFC20C0034 (Marshall Space Flight Center prefix). Place of performance: Hawthorne, CA (SpaceX HQ).
capture_method: POSTed /api/v2/search/spending_by_award/ filtered to recipient_search_text='SPACE EXPLORATION TECHNOLOGIES' + agencies.NASA + award_type_codes=A/B/C/D, sorted by Award Amount desc; picked the HLS contract from results page 1 (largest single non-IDIQ definitive contract). Then GET /api/v2/awards/<generated_internal_id>/ for the full detail JSON. ~8.5 KB persisted; no auth needed. JSON-API only — no browser-harness, no scraping, no ZIPs.
